title: Implement ADRs (Architecture Decision Records)
description: Implement a version-controlled process for creating Architecture Decision Records (ADRs). Document the rationale, alternatives considered, and trade-offs for high-impact architectural decisions. Utilize ADRs to establish historical context and foster consistency in architectural governance.
objectives: Implement a version-controlled process for creating Architecture Decision Records (ADRs).
